profile.name: Dean Yang
profile.bio: Passionate software engineer with over 5 years of experience in building scalable web applications and solving complex problems. Dedicated to clean code, performance optimization, and user-centric design.

items.description: Leading the frontend team in migrating legacy systems to Vue 3. Improved site performance by 40% and established a new design system.
Developed and maintained multiple client-facing applications using Node.js and React. Collaborated closely with product managers to deliver features on time.

items.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
items.description: A comprehensive dashboard for managing online store inventory and sales analytics.

items.title: Task Management App
items.description: A real-time collaborative task manager allowing teams to organize workflows efficiently.

items.title: Weather Forecast API
items.description: A high-performance RESTful API that aggregates weather data from multiple sources.
